Interact with your PocketBase instance u: 使用超级用户凭据与您的 PocketBase实例互动。
Your Pocketbase host URL (e.g., https://: 您的 Pocketbase 主机 URL (如：https://pocketbase.your-project.com)
The email address of your Pocketbase sup: Pocketbase 超级用户的电子邮件地址
\nProvide your PocketBase **host URL** a:
Provide your PocketBase **host URL** and **superuser credentials**.

Find your admin panel at `https://your-host/_/`.
Gets all the data for a given collection: 获取给定收藏的所有数据
Gets a paginated list of records from a: 从集合获取分页记录列表
Gets a single record by ID from a collec: 通过集合获取单个记录
Updates a single record in a collection: 在集合中更新单条记录
Deletes a single record from a collectio: 从收藏中删除单条记录
Order attribute(s). Use - for DESC, + fo: 订单属性(s). Use - for DESC, + for ASC. E.g.: -created,id
Auto expand relations. E.g.: relField1,r: 自动展开关系。例如: relField1,relField2.subRelfield。
Comma separated fields to return. E.g.:: 逗号分隔要返回的字段。例如：*,exten.relField.name
The page (offset) of the paginated list: 分页列表的页面(偏移) (默认: 1)
Max returned records per page (default:: 每页最大返回记录数量(默认：30)
Skip total counts query for faster resul: 跳过总计数查询以获得更快的结果 (总计项和总计页面将为 -1)
JSON object with the fields to create. E: 要创建字段的 JSON 对象。例如.: ~"title": "test", "score": 123 }
JSON object with the fields to update. E: 需要更新字段的 JSON 对象。例如: own "title": "test", "score": 123 }
